rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid scopes based on the component type or implementation context
Ensure that all referenced identifiers in AGREE annex blocks are visible in the target scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type contracts when concrete bounds are available
Write output dependency contracts that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not place assumptions and guarantees in invalid scopes
Do not reference identifiers that are not visible in the target scope
